スーイ♪ スーーイ♪<br>ふふっ♪ わたし、スケートが大の得意なんです♪:
Swee! Swee-e-e!♪
Fufu! I'm really good at skating!♪
ほら、司令官さまも一緒に滑りましょう？<br>凍らせてるのは表面だけですが、落ち:
See? Lord Commander, shall we skate together? The ice is only frozen
on the surface, but you won't fall through, so it's perfectly safe.
はい、わたしの手を握って――そうです、その調子です♪<br>一緒に滑るの、楽しい:
Yes, take my hand—that's it, just like that!♪
Skating together is fun, isn't it?♪
こうやってしていると、お姉ちゃんと一緒にスケートした時を思い出すなぁ……<br>:
Doing this reminds me of the time I skated with my big sister... Back
then, she took a spectacular fall... Fufu.♪
わたし……司令官さまとも、これからたくさんの思い出を<br>作っていきたいです…:
I... I want to make lots of memories with you too, Lord Commander...
So please, let's play together again!♪
